failedAssertions.reason: PA2 items are missing from the unified table when status filter is set to 'All'. The loadPendingApprovals() function in DashboardApprovalPage.tsx has a logic error where PA2 transactions are not fetched when the status filter is 'all'.
Same root cause as VAL-DASH-003: the 'All' status filter fails to include Pending Approval 2 transactions in the table view.
Module badges in the approval table are rendered as static <span> elements without any onClick handler or navigation logic. Clicking a module badge does not navigate to the module page.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Insufficient test data (only ~7 transactions instead of 100+ required)
No transactions >24h old available; would need database timestamp manipulation
Requires multi-instance Electron or network interception setup beyond current single-instance constraint
Mobile viewport verification not performed within session time constraints
Requires Lighthouse or dedicated accessibility scanning tool not available in current environment
Requires controlled error injection into IPC/database layer

appliedUpdates.description: Added CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for coa, aspek_kerja, blok, users reference tables to fix 'no such table: coa' errors on fresh installs
Added CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for coa, aspek_kerja, blok, users reference tables to fix 'no such table: coa' errors on fresh installs
Added CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for coa, aspek_kerja, blok, users reference tables to fix 'no such table: coa' errors on fresh installs
Confirmed Electron single-instance constraint prevents parallel validators; CDP port must differ from app's internal socket server port (9223 vs 9222)
